sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Photius</hi> Lexicographus, etc. [Phot.] <date TEIform="date">ix A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Lexicon,</title_> ed. S. A. Naber, Leiden, 1864-65 (cited without title). <title_ TEIform="title">Der Anfang des Lexikons des Photios,</title_> ed. R. Reitzenstein, Leipzig & Berlin 1907 (cited thus: Phot. p. . . R.). <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl. = Bibliotheca,</title_> = J.-P. Migne, <title_ TEIform="title">Patrologia Graeca,</title_> vol. ciii, Paris 1860 (cited by Bekker's pages).</item>
